rulings.Case Title: FRANK HENRY TANNER et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Judicial Council Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Order For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, April 8, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Douglass Insulation Company, Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories, Judicial Council interrogatories and request for production of documents and request for monetary sanctions is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
